## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on potential GrowthX and Parallel collaboration for content marketing and inbound strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Parallel is early in developing their inbound engine; GrowthX could provide significant value but ROI timeline is a consideration](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach focuses on building website content first, then expanding to distribution channels](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Next steps: Rick to discuss with co-founders; follow-up meeting scheduled for July 22nd at 3pm PT](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Marketing Efforts

  - [Parallel working with a LinkedIn agency for daily posts, but not seeing results](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Challenge: Convincing co-founders that content marketing can work despite previous agency's poor performance](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Timeline

  - [Typically 3 months to see notable traffic uptick after publishing content](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [5+ months for enough data to optimize conversions and show significant impact](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Focus on long-term organic growth to avoid overreliance on high-CAC paid channels](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Competitive Landscape Analysis

  - [SEMrush data shows Parallel's competitors have more organic momentum](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Parallel's estimated organic traffic: 49 visits/month (directional estimate)](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Identified 25,000+ keyword opportunities, many with low difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)

### Potential Strategies

  - [Leverage Reddit: Mine top subreddits for question patterns to inform content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Focus on building website content first, then expand to distribution channels](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Offer guidance on email nurture programs and social media, without direct execution](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)

### Upcoming GrowthX Workshop

  - [August 1st workshop on content creation processes](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Opportunity for Parallel team to gain deeper understanding of GrowthX's approach](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Rick to discuss GrowthX opportunity with co-founders](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Kyle to send workshop invitation and additional information](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for July 22nd at 3pm PT](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [Kyle to share the discussed document with more detailed analysis](https://fathom.video/share/D5iCpgGRxSrt4DT2hiivT5Ns_pWMSL6R?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
